name: Bethel Church
description: Bethel Church is a place to play pickleball in Boone, IA. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are private.
open_play_schedule: Sign up at playtimescheduler.com  Des Moines/Central Iowa group
fees: Private — Voluntary donation. Available as scheduled by the church. Visitors and new players welcome.

name: Memorial Park, Boone
description: Memorial Park, Boone is a place to play pickleball in Boone, IA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights. Reservations are not available.
